name: Address
description: Street addresses, mailing addresses, or physical site addresses
label: Address

name: AdminRegion
description: Administrative or political geographic regions — countries, states, provinces, counties, districts, municipalities, or named areas
label: AdminRegion

name: GeoCoordinate
description: Latitude/longitude pairs, GPS coordinates, or geospatial point data
label: GeoCoordinate

name: Geographic
description: Any column or table representing a physical location, address component, or geographic area
label: Geographic

name: NonGeographic
description: Columns with location-like names that do NOT represent physical geography (file paths, URLs, memory addresses)
label: NonGeographic

name: PostalCode
description: Postal codes, ZIP codes, or mail routing codes
label: PostalCode

name: Timezone
description: Timezone identifiers, UTC offsets, or time zone region names
label: Timezone
